subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 26/26] nfs4.1: move a lot of log/log_cb.info messages to log/log_cb.debug

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch reduces the verbosity of a Linux NFS4 client by lowering the logging level of numerous informational messages from 'info' to 'debug'. This change is intended to minimize unnecessary log output in normal operation, while still allowing for detailed debugging when needed. The modifications affect several files within the nfs4.1 module, specifically altering the logging behavior in response to various events and operations. Overall, this patch aims to strike a balance between providing useful diagnostic information and avoiding excessive log noise.
